enumeration_result: 17/17 pass; all edge counts and failure counts match paper's Theorem 3; all SCC sizes and structural decompositions match CLAIM.md
proof_gaps: Even-N reverse-reachability (every state reaches (1,1)) is sketched in PROOF_SKETCH.md §Completeness gap but not rigorously closed. Odd-N case is structurally complete, conditional on the even-N claim for N-1.
independence_note: Lane C was intended to be a fresh subagent; quota exhaustion forced main-session authorship. Degraded independence — the script is deterministic and re-runnable by any future reviewer, so the enumerative result is reproducible. The proof sketch is author-signed and should be re-reviewed when quota allows a fresh subagent pass.
